credentialRequestSummary: The following credentials will be requested:
loginExplain: To login with your credential wallet, you will need to have a credential wallet app installed
appInstallExplain: If you don't have a credential wallet yet, see suggested wallets at the Verifiable Credentials Playground
exchangeActiveExpiryMessage: Please complete the exchange in the allotted time:
exchangePageExplain: Please present a matching credential from your digital wallet.
noSchemeHandlerTitle: Did the app fail to launch?
noSchemeHandlerMessage: The wallet app may not be installed on this device.
qrPageExplain: Scan the following QR Code using a Wallet app on your phone.
qrFooter: Note: Already on your phone with a Wallet app? Open the Wallet app, then come back and tap on the QR code above.
qrDisclaimer: If you don't have a Wallet app download it from the app store.
homePageGreeting: Welcome to OpenCred, a service that enables you to verify credentials from a digital wallet.
openid4vpQrAnotherWay: Use a wallet on this device.
qrClickMessage: The Wallet app must be running in the background.
chapiPageAnotherWay: Looking for a QR code to scan with your wallet app instead?
selectWorkflow: Select a workflow to verify credentials
linkCopiedToClipboard: Link has been copied to clipboard.
pasteUrlInWallet: Paste the URL in your wallet app.
verificationSuccess: Success! Your credential has been shared.
